title: National Dog Day
description: Celebrate all things canine! Bring your pup in for pampering and receive 15% off full grooming services.

title: National Pet Day
description: Celebrate your beloved pets with a special grooming session. 20% off select services.

title: World Cat Day
description: While we specialize in dogs, we celebrate all pets! Perfect time for a grooming refresh.

title: Pet Parent Appreciation Week
description: Thank you for trusting us with your furry family members. Free nail trim with any grooming service.

title: National Dog Month
description: All month long! Enjoy special pricing on select grooming packages and boarding services.

title: Memorial Day
description: We are closed in observance of Memorial Day. Holiday hours resume the following day.

title: Independence Day (4th of July)
description: Closed for Independence Day. Please note that many pets get anxious during fireworks — consider our boarding services!

title: Labor Day
description: Closed in observance of Labor Day. We'll be back to our regular schedule on Tuesday.

title: Thanksgiving
description: Closed for Thanksgiving and the day after. Resume regular hours on Friday.

title: Christmas
description: Closed for Christmas. Limited boarding available — call now to reserve!

title: New Year's Day
description: Closed for New Year's Day. Happy New Year from The Dog House team!

title: Spring Grooming Season
description: Spring is here! Shed season begins. Book your grooming appointment now for summer-ready pups. De-shedding treatments available.

title: Summer Pet Safety Month
description: Keep your pet cool this summer! We offer hydration stations and premium conditioning treatments.

title: Back to School Prep
description: Getting ready for the school year? Our doggie daycare expands hours in August. Get your pup groomed and enrolled today!

title: Fall Coat Care Season
description: As temperatures drop, your pet's coat needs extra attention. Schedule a full grooming and conditioning treatment.

title: Winter Paw & Coat Care
description: Winter weather is tough on paws and coats. Bring your pet in for protective treatments and pad care.

title: Valentine's Day Special
description: Show your love! Buy a gift card and receive 25% bonus credit. Perfect gift for pet-loving friends!

title: Mother's Day Special
description: Give mom the gift of time! Gift certificates available with complimentary spa upgrade.

title: Father's Day Promotion
description: Dad and dog duo special! Get grooming service and doggie daycare combo at a special price.

title: Summer Sizzle Sale
description: Beat the heat with our summer special! 20% off all grooming services. Valid through August 31.

title: Black Friday / Cyber Monday
description: Biggest sale of the year! 30% off grooming packages, boarding, and gift cards. Four days only.

title: Holiday Gift Card Campaign
description: The perfect gift for pet lovers! Purchase $100+ in gift cards and receive $25 bonus credit.

title: New Year New Pup Fitness
description: New Year, new routine! Sign up for winter doggie daycare package and save 15%.

title: Refer a Friend Program
description: Know a dog lover? Refer them and get $25 credit when they book their first service!

title: The Dog House Anniversary Sale
description: We're celebrating 26 years! Special pricing on all services during our anniversary month.

title: First-Time Customer Special
description: New to The Dog House? Get 20% off your first grooming service. Available year-round!

title: Loyalty Rewards Program
description: Every grooming earns points! Earn free services and exclusive perks. Ask about membership today.

title: Senior Pet Wellness Month
description: Seniors deserve special care! 15% discount on grooming and specialized bath treatments for pets 7+.

title: Easter Bunny Grooming Special
description: Hop into spring! Grooming packages include complimentary bow tie or bandana.

title: Thanksgiving Prep Grooming
description: Family photos coming up? Book your grooming early! Express services available.

title: Holiday Party Perfect Grooming
description: Get your pup party-ready! Holiday-themed services and premium styling available.

title: Spring Cleaning Groom
description: Deep clean and refresh! Our spring de-shedding treatment removes winter coat buildup.

title: Preventative Care Month
description: Keep your pet healthy! Learn about our grooming services that help detect skin issues early.

title: Puppy Introduction Special
description: New puppy? Schedule their first grooming experience with 25% discount!

title: Summer Boarding Peak Season
description: Travel season is here! Reserve your dog's boarding spot early. Limited availability June-August.

title: End of Summer Closeout
description: Summer sale finale! 25% off all remaining summer packages through Labor Day.

title: May Flash Sale
description: Limited time! 48-hour flash sale: 30% off select premium grooming services.

title: July 4th Week Special
description: Celebrate with us! Extended hours and 18% off all services this holiday week.

title: Professional Grooming Month
description: March celebrates professional grooming! Showcase why your dog deserves professional care.

title: Thanksgiving Boarding Available
description: Don't leave your pet behind! Book Thanksgiving boarding early. We have limited holiday slots.

title: Christmas Holiday Boarding
description: Holiday travel plans? Reserve boarding NOW. Holiday weeks fill up quickly!

title: New Year's Eve Boarding
description: Keep your pup safe from fireworks! Book a fun New Year's Eve at our facility.

title: Pet Wellness Awareness
description: Learn how regular grooming prevents common pet health issues. Free consultation with any booking.

title: Summer Hydration & Cooling
description: Combat the Houston heat! Our premium cooling baths and hydrating treatments now available.

title: Birthday Month Pet Special
description: It's your pet's birthday? Book grooming in their birthday month and get 18% off + free bandana!

title: Group Booking Discount
description: Bringing multiple pets? Book 3+ pets in one month and receive 10% discount per service.
